news.title:
Mangal Credit approved 3,000 secured NCDs allotment at ₹98,000 each, raising ₹30 crore.
NCDs have a 30-month tenure, 11.75% p.a. interest, paid monthly, secured by assets.
news.summary:
Mangal Credit approved 3,000 secured NCDs allotment at ₹98,000 each, raising ₹30 crore.
NCDs have a 30-month tenure, 11.75% p.a. interest, paid monthly, secured by assets.

news.title:
Mangal Credit board approves raising ₹30 crore via secured, listed NCDs.
NCDs have a 30-month tenure, 11.75% interest p.a., maturity Sep 18, 2028.
news.summary:
Mangal Credit board approves raising ₹30 crore via secured, listed NCDs.
NCDs have a 30-month tenure, 11.75% interest p.a., maturity Sep 18, 2028.

news.title:
Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd plans a board meeting on Mar 5, 2026.
The meeting will discuss fund raising via issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures.
news.summary:
Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd plans a board meeting on Mar 5, 2026.
The meeting will discuss fund raising via issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures.

news.title:
Mangal Credit's Q3 FY25 net sales rose 44.4% YoY to Rs 18.3 crore, with net profit up 10.2% to Rs 3.8 crore.
EBITDA increased 44.9% YoY to Rs 14.2 crore; EPS improved to Rs 1.82. Shares closed at Rs 179.4 with 12.8% 1-year gains.
news.summary:
Mangal Credit's Q3 FY25 net sales rose 44.4% YoY to Rs 18.3 crore, with net profit up 10.2% to Rs 3.8 crore.
EBITDA increased 44.9% YoY to Rs 14.2 crore; EPS improved to Rs 1.82. Shares closed at Rs 179.4 with 12.8% 1-year gains.

news.title:
Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd.'s board approved unaudited financial results for Dec 2025, with revenue from operations at INR 4859.98 lakh, up from INR 3621.07 lakh YoY.
The company issued INR 10 crore NCDs during the quarter, maintaining required security cover and compliance under SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd.'s board approved unaudited financial results for Dec 2025, with revenue from operations at INR 4859.98 lakh, up from INR 3621.07 lakh YoY.
The company issued INR 10 crore NCDs during the quarter, maintaining required security cover and compliance under SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Crisil reaffirmed Mangal Credit and Fincorp's BBB Stable rating citing sound capital and profitability.
The rating reflects stable asset quality, modest resources, and geographic concentration risks.
news.summary:
Crisil reaffirmed Mangal Credit and Fincorp's BBB Stable rating citing sound capital and profitability.
The rating reflects stable asset quality, modest resources, and geographic concentration risks.

news.title:
Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd confirmed timely interest payment of Rs. 54.8 lakh on NCDs due 03 Jan 2026.
The Rs. 50 crore NCDs, with ISIN INE545L07036, had a monthly interest payment frequency.
news.summary:
Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd confirmed timely interest payment of Rs. 54.8 lakh on NCDs due 03 Jan 2026.
The Rs. 50 crore NCDs, with ISIN INE545L07036, had a monthly interest payment frequency.

news.title:
Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd confirmed timely payment of Rs. 42.4L interest on NCDs.
Interest payment was made on 3rd December 2025 as per SEBI Listing Regulations.
news.summary:
Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd confirmed timely payment of Rs. 42.4L interest on NCDs.
Interest payment was made on 3rd December 2025 as per SEBI Listing Regulations.

news.title:
Mangal Credit allotted 1,000 secured NCDs worth ₹10 Cr at ₹99,752.60/NCD.
NCDs have a tenure of 1 year 10 months, 12.9% p.a. interest, maturing Oct 2027.
news.summary:
Mangal Credit allotted 1,000 secured NCDs worth ₹10 Cr at ₹99,752.60/NCD.
NCDs have a tenure of 1 year 10 months, 12.9% p.a. interest, maturing Oct 2027.

news.title:
Mangal Credit & Fincorp's Q2 FY25 net profit dropped 7.5% to Rs 2.98 crore.
Sales rose 35.7% to Rs 15.82 crore compared to the previous year.
news.summary:
Mangal Credit & Fincorp's Q2 FY25 net profit dropped 7.5% to Rs 2.98 crore.
Sales rose 35.7% to Rs 15.82 crore compared to the previous year.

news.title:
Mangal Credit & Fincorp paid Rs. 43.8L interest for NCDs on the due date, Nov 3, 2025.
Payment details: ISIN INE545L07036, size Rs. 40Cr, monthly frequency, record date Oct 19, 2025.
news.summary:
Mangal Credit & Fincorp paid Rs. 43.8L interest for NCDs on the due date, Nov 3, 2025.
Payment details: ISIN INE545L07036, size Rs. 40Cr, monthly frequency, record date Oct 19, 2025.
